tools.name: find_texas_electricity_plans
tools.description: Find and compare residential electricity plans in Texas's deregulated market. Use this when the user asks about electricity plans, retail electric providers (REPs), the cheapest or lowest-rate plan, fixed-rate plans, 12- or 24-month contracts, 100% renewable / green plans, switching providers, lowering their electric bill, or setting up service at a new Texas address. Works for deregulated Texas metros like Dallas and Houston, and any Texas ZIP served by Oncor, CenterPoint, AEP Texas, or TNMP. Do NOT use for: Austin (Austin Energy), San Antonio (CPS Energy), El Paso (El Paso Electric), municipal utilities, electric co-ops, other US states, natural gas, water, or commercial accounts.
